// description: Deno task configuration for the IDApTIK Universal Modding Studio. Orchestrates ReScript compilation, Gossamer backend, and production builds.

tasks.dev: deno task res:build && (deno task res:watch & deno task gossamer:dev)
tasks.build: deno task res:build && deno task gossamer:build
tasks.validate: deno task test && deno task test:zig
